ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "cylinder_count" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time taken to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car manufacturer */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel, all-wheel) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the car (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the car in inches */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the car in inches */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the car in inches */,
  "wheelbase" REAL /* Wheelbase of the car in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time on a standard track in seconds */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 to 0 mph in feet */,
  "cornering_g" REAL /* Cornering G-force experienced during turns */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the car in miles per hour */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time taken to cover a quarter mile in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., exterior, interior, engine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_images_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, search, view car details) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
